colaboradores: POST /api/colaboradores {setor_id, tipo_contrato_id, nome, sexo, horas_semanais?, rank?, prefere_turno?, evitar_dia_semana?} → Colaborador (201)

current_frontend_state.service_layer: NONE - all pages use raw fetch()
current_frontend_state.state_management: NONE - no Zustand store created yet
current_frontend_state.ui_library: NONE - all manual Tailwind CSS, no shadcn

details.App.tsx: Simple Routes wrapper with AppShell, 3 routes only
details.main.tsx: BrowserRouter + StrictMode, no providers (no TooltipProvider, no SidebarProvider)
details.AppShell.tsx: Manual sidebar with raw Tailwind (w-56, bg-white, etc), 3 nav items, no icons, no collapsible
details.index.css: Only @tailwind directives, no shadcn theme variables
details.Dashboard.tsx: Raw fetch('/api/dashboard'), manual Widget component, no Card/Badge/Button shadcn
details.SetorLista.tsx: Raw fetch + raw <input>/<button>, basic CRUD works, no Dialog, no search, no archived toggle
details.ContratoLista.tsx: Raw fetch, read-only display, no create/edit/delete UI

config_state.vite_config: Path alias @/ configured, proxy /api→localhost:3333 configured, react plugin active
config_state.tailwind_config: Minimal - content paths ok but NO shadcn theme extension, NO plugins (need tailwindcss-animate)
config_state.tsconfig: Path alias @/* → ./src/* configured, references shared package, strict mode on

patterns: MONOREPO: npm workspaces with apps/api, apps/web, packages/shared
NAMING: Portuguese for component/page names (componentes/, paginas/, servicos/) - follow existing pattern
NAMING: snake_case throughout DB/JSON/TS - never convert to camelCase
EXPORTS: Named exports (not default) for all components - export function X()
TYPES: Import from @escalaflow/shared, never duplicate type definitions
ROUTING: react-router-dom v7 with BrowserRouter in main.tsx, Routes/Route in App.tsx
API PROXY: Vite proxies /api to localhost:3333 - frontend uses relative /api/* paths
FOLDER STRUCTURE: componentes/ (not components/), paginas/ (not pages/), will add servicos/, estado/, lib/
STATE: useState/useEffect pattern for data fetching (no react-query or SWR)
V0_DIFFERENCES: V0 uses 'AUSENCIA' for status but real API uses 'INDISPONIVEL'
V0_DIFFERENCES: V0 Violacao uses 'tipo' field but real shared types use 'severidade' field
V0_DIFFERENCES: V0 Empresa has corte_semanal+tolerancia but real Empresa only has nome+cidade+estado
V0_DIFFERENCES: V0 uses Next.js patterns (Link href, usePathname, use(params), 'use client') that must be converted
V0 sidebar uses size='icon-sm' button variant that may not exist in standard shadcn - verify
findings.approach: 6-phase implementation following PRD exactly. Phase 0: Install shadcn/ui via CLI + configure (tailwind-animate, css variables, cn()). Phase 1: Replace AppShell with shadcn Sidebar + PageHeader, add all 8 routes to App.tsx, wrap in SidebarProvider+TooltipProvider. Phase 2: Create service layer (api.ts wrapper + 7 entity services) + Zustand store + helpers (cores.ts, formatadores.ts). Phase 3: Rewrite 3 existing pages (Dashboard, SetorLista, ContratoLista) with shadcn + services. Phase 4: Build 5 new pages (SetorDetalhe, ColaboradorLista, ColaboradorDetalhe, EscalaPagina, EmpresaConfig). Phase 5: Build EscalaGrid component (the product core). Phase 6: Polish (toast everywhere, loading/error/empty states, error boundary, cross-page navigation). Each phase builds on previous - no skipping.

v0_prototype_analysis.ui_components_used: sidebar, breadcrumb, card, badge, button, input, label, select, dialog, tabs, tooltip, separator, collapsible, switch, scroll-area

key_patterns.sidebar: collapsible='icon', 2 groups (Principal + Configuracao), 6 nav items with lucide icons
key_patterns.escala_grid: 330 lines, table-based, weekly nav, sticky columns, tooltip per cell, coverage footer row, legend
key_patterns.dialog_pattern: Dialog with DialogContent > Header > form fields > Footer (Cancel + Submit)
key_patterns.empty_states: Icon (40px, muted) + text message + optional CTA button
key_patterns.status_badges: Badge variant='outline' with custom border/bg/text colors per status

v0_prototype_analysis.mock_data_note: V0 uses lib/mock-data.ts for all data. Real implementation must use service layer calling API endpoints.

dependencies_to_install.shadcn_init: npx shadcn@latest init (installs clsx, tailwind-merge, tailwindcss-animate, class-variance-authority)

files_to_modify: apps/web/src/App.tsx (add all 8 routes, replace AppShell with SidebarProvider layout)
apps/web/tailwind.config.js (add shadcn theme extensions + tailwindcss-animate plugin)
apps/web/package.json (new dependencies added by install commands)
risks: SHADCN INIT: shadcn CLI init may need special flags for Vite (not Next.js). May need manual config if CLI assumes Next.js. Fallback: manually create components.json + copy CSS variables.
SHADCN SIDEBAR: The Sidebar component is complex (SidebarProvider context, cookie persistence, keyboard shortcut). V0 prototype already uses it successfully. Ensure same version compatibility.
REACT 19 + SHADCN: Some shadcn components may have React 19 compatibility issues with Radix UI primitives. Watch for 'ref' forwarding warnings.
V0 TYPE MISMATCHES: V0 uses 'AUSENCIA' status but real API returns 'INDISPONIVEL'. EscalaGrid must use 'INDISPONIVEL'. V0 Violacao uses 'tipo' but shared uses 'severidade'.
V0 button size='icon-sm': Not a standard shadcn button size variant. Need to either add this variant or use a different approach.
DND-KIT: @dnd-kit needs careful integration with React 19. Verify compatibility before installing.
ESCALA GRID PERFORMANCE: With 16 colaboradores * 31 days = ~500 cells per setor. Using .find() per cell is O(n) per cell. PRD mandates Map-based lookup.
API ERROR HANDLING: Current backend returns error messages in Portuguese via JSON {error: '...'} with appropriate HTTP status codes. ApiError class must capture both.

ESCALAS ROUTE NOTE: GET /api/escalas/:id returns violacoes:[] (empty array always) because violations are computed at generation time only, not persisted. Frontend must track violations from the generate response.
SCOPE SIZE: 8 pages + 20+ components + service layer + shadcn foundation is a LOT. Phase 0-1 must be rock solid before continuing.
